blue_oceans.notes: 4.41M community across r/Cooking (3.5M), r/AskCulinary (420K), r/recipes (490K). All top apps are recipe browsers and video libraries — passive content consumption. No app gamifies the daily culinary skill habit (one knife cut technique drilled, one sauce built from scratch, one heat-control lesson practiced) with streak XP, technique badges (brunoise, hollandaise, maillard mastery), and chef level progression from home cook to line cook to chef de partie.

1.14M community across r/chefknives (320K), r/KitchenConfidential (710K), r/culinaryschool (105K). Apps are sharpening angle utilities and passive video courses. No app gamifies the daily knife skills habit (one brunoise timed drill, one julienne accuracy challenge, one chiffonade session logged) with streak XP, precision badges, and skill-level progression from rough chop to mise en place mastery.

4.44M community across r/BBQ (2.1M), r/smoking (1.5M), r/grilling (840K). Apps are thermometer utilities, hardware companions, and recipe browsers. No app gamifies the daily grilling habit (one fire management session, one smoke wood experiment logged, one brisket flat technique practiced) with streak XP, smoke master badges, and pitmaster level gates from backyard griller to competition smoker.

4.61M community across r/Coffee (4M), r/espresso (380K), r/barista (225K). Apps are hardware companions (Acaia scale, Fellow kettle) and static recipe references. No app gamifies the daily coffee brewing habit (one extraction dialed, one ratio logged, one brew method practiced) with streak XP, barista level progression from home brewer to SCA certified, and technique mastery badges (bloom control, WDT distribution, channeling prevention).

3.44M community across r/Baking (2.3M), r/Breadit (830K), r/cakedecorating (310K). Apps are recipe databases and static reference guides. No app gamifies the daily baking habit (one proofing window practiced, one lamination fold logged, one pastry technique drilled) with streak XP, technique badges (windowpane test, lamination layers, meringue stages), and baker level progression from beginner to pastry chef.

1.39M community across r/Sourdough (560K), r/Breadit (830K). Sourdough Companion is a timer/calculator utility, not a streak app. No app gamifies the daily sourdough habit (starter feeding logged, bulk fermentation window tracked, scoring pattern practiced) with streak XP, crumb structure badges (open crumb, ear development, bloom), and sourdough baker progression from starter keeper to master baker.

2.61M community (using r/cakedecorating 310K + r/Baking 2.3M, excluding broad r/foodporn). Wilton app is a recipe/technique browser, cake game is casual entertainment, Domestika is a passive course platform. No app gamifies the daily pastry decorating habit (one piping technique practiced, one fondant drape logged, one sugar flower completed) with streak XP, decorator level gates, and technique mastery badges (rosette, basket weave, isomalt work).

5.38M community across r/nutrition (1.5M), r/EatCheapAndHealthy (3.2M), r/HealthyFood (680K). MyFitnessPal and Cronometer are food loggers (passive tracking, not education). Noom is a weight-loss coaching subscription. No app gamifies the daily nutrition education habit (one micronutrient studied, one food-as-medicine concept mastered, one macronutrient timing principle drilled) with streak XP, dietitian level progression, and knowledge badges (glycemic load, bioavailability, anti-inflammatory compounds).

3.42M community across r/MealPrepSunday (3M), r/mealprep (420K). Mealime, Plan to Eat, and Prepear are all planning/grocery apps — passive organization not active habit streaks. No app gamifies the daily meal prep habit (one batch cooking session logged, one container portioning technique practiced, one protein prep method drilled) with streak XP, prep-efficiency badges, and meal prepper level progression from novice to batch cooking pro.

2.09M community across r/vegan (1.5M), r/veganrecipes (420K), r/PlantBasedDiet (165K). HappyCow is a restaurant finder, Forks Over Knives is a WFPB recipe browser, VeganEats is a product scanner. No app gamifies the daily vegan cooking habit (one plant protein technique mastered, one whole-food sauce built, one nutritional completeness check practiced) with streak XP, technique badges (aquafaba, cashew cream, tempeh fermentation), and plant-based chef level gates.

940K community across r/fermentation (510K), r/Kombucha (210K), r/mead (220K). Apps are batch loggers and calculators, not streak apps. No app gamifies the daily fermentation habit (one culture check logged, one pH reading practiced, one brine ratio calculated) with streak XP, fermenter level progression, and technique mastery badges (SCOBY health, lacto-fermentation timing, kahm yeast management).

1.19M community across r/cocktails (630K), r/bartenders (380K), r/CocktailsAndBarSupplies (180K). All apps are recipe browsers and static references. No app gamifies the daily cocktail making habit (one shaking technique practiced, one stirring dilution logged, one flavor balance built) with streak XP, mixology mastery badges (free-pour accuracy, clarification technique, fat-washing), and bartender level progression from home hobbyist to competition-level mixologist.

975K community across r/tea (820K), r/TeaCulture (45K). Teaset is a timer, Tea Hermit is a static encyclopaedia, Steepster is a rating app. No app gamifies the daily tea brewing habit (one gong fu session logged, one water temperature experiment practiced, one origin studied) with streak XP, tea master level progression, and technique mastery badges (gaiwan control, leaf-to-water ratio, rinse-and-steep cycles).

700K targeted community (r/wine 500K + r/winemaking 200K; excluding broad r/food). Vivino dominates wine scanning and community rating but is a discovery/shopping platform, not a daily education streak. No app gamifies the daily wine education habit (one varietal blind-tasted, one terroir concept studied, one food pairing principle practiced) with streak XP, sommelier level progression from WSET Level 1 to Master Sommelier concepts, and technique mastery badges (blind tasting, decanting, cellar management).

730K targeted community (r/foodphotography 310K + r/mealprep 420K for overlap; excluding broad r/FoodPorn 22M general viewers). VSCO and Lightroom are professional editing suites, Foodie is a color filter app. No app gamifies the daily food photography habit (one natural light setup practiced, one hero shot composition attempted, one prop styling session logged) with streak XP, photographer level gates, and technique mastery badges (catch lights, Fresnel diffusion, overhead flat-lay mastery).
